system.description:
Pertaining to the care and serving of guests, passengers, and others who expect a certain level of quality service.
  • Cooking a fine meal: Steward/INT 8+
  • Knowing what the etiquette is for greeting a noble: Steward/SOC 8+
  • Performing an elaborate tea service: Steward/SOC 10+
system.shortdescr: Care and serving of guests, cooking, and etiquette.
